content_body:
Be sure to spend some time at Mountain Mama's Coffee Lounge, an exclusive craft coffee and tea bar in Downtown Blue Ridge. A cozy and quaint coffee lounge offering sofas, chairs, tables/chairs in an atmosphere that is so relaxing ~ Lose yourself in a book in front of the fireplace, or sit at the bar in front of large windows and people-watch. Listen to live music on some days and just hang out. 

Open from 7 days a week, you can experience trained baristas, homemade flavors and foods, creative combinations, and an intimate space to sip, bite, meet, work, or play.
title: Mountain Mamas Coffee Lounge
